title: Sunshine SMP Required Pack
description: The official Sunshine SMP Modpack! Use the newest version to play.
body:
Welcome to Sunshine SMP!

You were brought here because this is the pack you must use to play our server! Please only use the most recent version to play our server. If you experience any bugs/errors, please open a Support Ticket in our Discord server!

This pack includes:

Over 100 New Biomes!
300+ Different Structures!
The Create Mod and other technology mods
Multiple extensive Furniture Mods
Farmers Delight
Super-Upgraded Vanilla Structures
300+ New Creatures!
New Bosses
And SOO much more!!
This pack is supported for Sunshine SMP and is not reccomended for general use.
